PowerShell(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from skinny.renderer import pack_flat_material; from skinny.scene import Material; m = Material\(name='test', parameter_overrides={'diffuseColor': \(0.8, 0.2, 0.1\), 'roughness': 0.3, 'metallic': 0.0, 'specular': 0.5, 'opacity': 0.0, 'ior': 1.5}\); data = pack_flat_material\(m\); print\(f'Packed {len\(data\)} bytes'\); import struct; vals = struct.unpack\('fff f f f f I I I I I fff f', data\); print\(f'diffuse=\({vals[0]:.2f},{vals[1]:.2f},{vals[2]:.2f}\), rough={vals[3]:.2f}, metal={vals[4]:.2f}, spec={vals[5]:.2f}, opacity={vals[6]:.2f}'\); print\(f'emissive=\({vals[12]:.2f},{vals[13]:.2f},{vals[14]:.2f}\), ior={vals[15]:.2f}'\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from skinny.renderer import pack_flat_material, FLAT_MATERIAL_STRIDE; from skinny.scene import Material; m = Material\(name='copper', parameter_overrides={'metallic': 1.0, 'roughness': 0.25, 'coat': 1.0, 'coat_color': \(0.96, 0.38, 0.26\), 'coat_roughness': 0.2}\); d = pack_flat_material\(m\); print\(f'Packed {len\(d\)} bytes \(stride={FLAT_MATERIAL_STRIDE}\)'\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import sys,struct; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); from skinny.renderer import pack_flat_material; from skinny.scene import Material; m=Material\(name='copper',parameter_overrides={'metallic':1.0,'roughness':0.25,'coat':1.0,'coat_color':\(0.96,0.38,0.26\),'coat_roughness':0.2,'coat_IOR':1.6}\); d=pack_flat_material\(m\); vals=struct.unpack\('ffffffIIIIIfffffffff',d[0:76]+d[80:96]\); print\('OK: %d bytes, coat=%.1f coatRough=%.1f coatIOR=%.1f' % \(len\(d\), struct.unpack_from\('f',d,64\)[0], struct.unpack_from\('f',d,68\)[0], struct.unpack_from\('f',d,72\)[0]\)\); cc=struct.unpack_from\('fff',d,80\); print\('coatColor=\(%.2f,%.2f,%.2f\)' % cc\)")
